bbox.description:
Weighted Fair Queuing (WFQ):
▪ generalized Round Robin
▪ each class, i, has weight, wᵢ, and gets weighted amount of service in each cycle:
  wᵢ/Σⱼwⱼ
▪ minimum bandwidth guarantee (per-traffic-class)
